specific_location: Lac Amora trail by Josh's pond on Broomfield open space.
description: medium size songbird. Dark Blue with a black eye patch that fell down a little towards the cheek. Grey or dull yellow beak.Striking brown patch on the wing.Behaviors: Sitting on a dried yucca flower signing like crazy with the surrounding meadowlarks.Call: Singing like crazyPlumage: not known
